tags.name: `mc-icon`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying SVG icons with customizable size and color.
Category: Content Display
When to use: When you need to display icons in your application with specific styles.
When not to use: When you need to display non-SVG icons, pictograms or images.
Works with components: all components
Alternative component names: Icon, SVG Icon

Attributes:

  * `title` {`string`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon

  * `size` {`IconSize`} - Size of the icon `16`, `20` or `24`

  * `color` {`string | undefined`} - Fill color of the icon.
If not supplied, the default color token `--mdt-theme-icon-color`
will be picked up via CSS.

Properties:

  * `convertedSize` {`string`} - 

  * `svg` {`Promise<DirectiveResult<typeof UnsafeSVGDirective>> | undefined`} - 

  * `supportsDynamicImport` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `title` {`string`} - 

  * `iconTitle` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon

  * `size` {`IconSize`} - Size of the icon `16`, `20` or `24`

  * `color` {`string | undefined`} - Fill color of the icon.
If not supplied, the default color token `--mdt-theme-icon-color`
will be picked up via CSS.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description:
`icon` {`string`} - Name of the icon

Property: icon

Default: empty

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
`size` {`IconSize`} - Size of the icon `16`, `20` or `24`

Property: size

Default: 20

attributes.name: color
attributes.description:
`color` {`string | undefined`} - Fill color of the icon.
If not supplied, the default color token `--mdt-theme-icon-color`
will be picked up via CSS.

Property: color
